# AGATEX Paper & Pulp — Process Chemicals for Pulp & Paper

> AGATEX Paper & Pulp is the pulp-and-paper business of AGATEX Feinchemie GmbH, an independent Austrian family-owned specialty-chemicals maker founded in 1921 (fifth generation). AGATEX develops, formulates and tests tailored additives for pulp and paper production — defoamers and deaerators, and wetting agents and emulsifiers. The portfolio ranges from silicone-free to highly effective specialty formulations and is tuned to the mill's furnish, machine and paper grade. Result: higher process stability, better sheet formation, fewer pores, and reduced chemical and energy consumption.

## Company
- Legal entity: AGATEX Feinchemie GmbH (brand: "AGATEX Paper & Pulp")
- Founded: 1921 (as Alpenländische Industriegaswerke), Austria; independent family business, 5th generation
- Headquarters: Aichham 11, A-4650 Lambach/Edt, Upper Austria
- APAC: AGATEX (Thailand) Co., Ltd., Bangkok (Thong Lor, Sukhumvit)
- Field: organic specialty chemistry (also textile & fibre auxiliaries, surface protection, lubricants & processing aids, refrigerants)
- Compliance: REACH (established compliance processes, part of quality & environmental management)
- Sustainability: silicone-free options, reduced chemical & energy consumption, resource-efficient production
- In-house application lab: AGATEX Innovation Centre (AIC)
- Website: https://www.agatex-pulpandpaper.com/  · Parent: https://www.agatex.at
- Contact: office@agatex.at · +43 (7245) 32341-0 · APAC: apac@agatex.at
- Languages: German (default), English, Chinese

## What these additives do
Defoaming (destroy disruptive surface foam in process water for a continuous, efficient run), deaeration (release entrapped air, prevent pore formation, improve sheet formation and homogeneity), wetting/impregnation (lower surface tension, optimise wetting/leveling times) and emulsification (stabilise oil-in-water and water-in-oil emulsions). Applied across stock preparation, the wet end, sheet formation, press/drying and coating.

## Products (two pillars)
### Defoamers & Deaerators — LAMEX®  (/defoamers.html)
LAMEX® defoamers minimise disruptive foam in process water, ensuring a continuous, efficient production process — improved machine performance, greater production stability and better economic efficiency. LAMEX® deaerators promote the release of entrapped air, preventing pore formation and improving sheet formation, which contributes to the quality and homogeneity of paper products. Available as silicone and silicone-free systems, for paper grades from standard and coated paper to tissue, hygiene paper, cigarette paper, carton/board and pulp.
### Wetting Agents & Emulsifiers — LAMBATOL®  (/wetting-agents.html)
LAMBATOL® wetting agents optimise wetting/impregnation and leveling times by lowering surface tension for even, fast penetration. LAMBATOL® emulsifiers enhance the stability of oil-in-water and water-in-oil emulsions. Used in impregnation, coating and colouring.

## Paper grades served  (/paper-grades.html)
Standard (graphic) paper, coated paper, tissue, hygiene paper, cigarette paper, carton/board, and pulp. Each grade has different furnish, machine speed, water-loop and quality needs; AGATEX matches defoamer/deaerator and wetting-agent chemistry to the grade.

## Where the additives act (paper process)
- Stock preparation / pulp: defoaming, deaeration
- Wet end & sheet formation: deaeration (fewer pores), foam control in white water
- Press & drying: process stability, cleaner runnability
- Coating & colouring: wetting/leveling, emulsion stability, defoaming of coating colours

## AGATEX Innovation Centre (AIC)
In-house application lab where the behaviour and efficiency of all products are continuously tested, evaluated and optimised under practical conditions. A combination of standardised laboratory tests and customer-specific application tests enables tailored formulations that reliably perform under real production conditions — efficiently, compatibly and sustainably. AGATEX R&D works closely with sales, production and application technology to cover entire production chains.

## Key terms — English
paper process defoamer, antifoam for process water, deaerator / air-release agent, silicone-free defoamer, foam control white water, entrained air control, wetting agent for paper, leveling agent, emulsifier (O/W, W/O), coating additive, tissue defoamer, board / carton defoamer, cigarette paper defoamer, pulp defoamer, sheet formation, wet end chemistry, REACH-compliant paper chemicals, sustainable paper additives

## Key terms — Deutsch
Entschäumer Prozesswasser, Antischaummittel Papier, Entlüfter / Entgasungsmittel, silikonfreier Entschäumer, Schaumkontrolle Siebwasser, eingeschlossene Luft, Netzmittel Papier, Egalisiermittel, Emulgator (Öl-in-Wasser / Wasser-in-Öl), Streichhilfsmittel, Tissue-Entschäumer, Karton-Entschäumer, Zellstoff-Entschäumer, Blattbildung, Nasspartie, REACH-konforme Papierchemie, nachhaltige Papieradditive

## Key terms — 中文
造纸消泡剂, 工艺水消泡剂, 脱气剂/脱泡剂, 无硅消泡剂, 白水泡沫控制, 夹带空气控制, 造纸渗透剂/润湿剂, 流平剂, 乳化剂（水包油/油包水）, 涂布助剂, 生活用纸消泡剂, 纸板消泡剂, 纸浆消泡剂, 成形, 湿部化学, 符合REACH的造纸化学品, 可持续造纸添加剂
